business.name: All Electrician Solutions Pensacola FL
business.tagline: When power problems hit, we solve them fast

hero.headline: *Circuit breakers, outlets, panels* — we fix it all
hero.subheadline: 9 five-star reviews say it best: we show up, diagnose fast, and get your power back on without the runaround.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Wire, Every Switch, Every Problem
services_section.subheading: From blown circuits to complete panel upgrades — we handle electrical issues the right way, every time.

services.title: Circuit Breaker Repair
services.description: Power cutting out in rooms? We'll find the faulty breaker, replace it, and test your whole system to prevent future outages.

services.title: Light Installation & Upgrades
services.description: New fixtures, old wiring updates, or adding lights where none existed. Clean installation, zero delays, worth every penny.

services.title: Electrical Panel Service
services.description: Full inspections, switchboard repairs, and panel upgrades. We'll identify problems before they become expensive disasters.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Work
services.description: Dead outlets, faulty switches, or adding new ones. We wire it right the first time with clean, coordinated installation.

about.heading: Pensacola's Go-To Electrical Problem Solvers
about.body: When the lights go out or circuits start acting up, you need someone who shows up fast and fixes it right. That's exactly what we do. Nine perfect Google reviews from neighbors who've watched us diagnose electrical problems quickly and solve them without unnecessary costs. Licensed, insured, and ready to handle whatever's wrong with your electrical system.

reviews.name: Morgan T.
reviews.text: Power was cutting out in multiple rooms. They did a complete inspection, found the bad breaker fast, and had everything working perfectly.

reviews.name: Buller D.
reviews.text: Perfect work installing new lights — finished faster than I expected!

reviews.name: Houston B.
reviews.text: Updated all my old lighting fixtures. Zero delays, clean wiring work, definitely worth what I paid.

reviews.name: Graham S.
reviews.text: Friendly service, showed up on time, fixed my switchboard without trying to sell me stuff I didn't need.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Pensacola & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast electrical service throughout Northwest Florida

cta.heading: Electrical Problems Don't Wait — Neither Do We
cta.body: Call now for fast diagnosis and honest pricing. Same electricians your neighbors trust, same quality work every time.
